backend.changelog: Documents you download to your folder now get readable names (Title, Enterprise Item Number, Revision) with per-assembly subfolders, and the Excel BOM links match them - pick the format in Settings (Generate tab, Download section). ERP/Pantheon file names are unchanged. The Refresh button now sits to the left of Export.

cadBridge.changelog: Resolve virtual components by their stable child name so STEP and 3D PDF are produced for them (fixes the in-session vs BOM parent-name mismatch that left them missing on a fresh cache).
